hypothesis: Regime-adjusted risk sizing remained duplicated between quant/run.py and quant/backtester.py. Moving the NEUTRAL and BEAR_SHALLOW risk_pct override into production_parity.py should prevent future sizing drift without changing strategy behavior.
change_summary: Added production_parity.risk_pct_for_market_state and switched production and backtest adapters to call it. Added a focused parity test for BULL/default, NEUTRAL 0.75%, BEAR_SHALLOW 0.50%, and BEAR_DEEP/default behavior.

parameters.single_causal_variable: shared implementation location for regime risk_pct override

notes: This is parity governance, not alpha search. No fixed-window backtest is required beyond no-behavior-change testing because only duplicate adapter arithmetic moved into a shared helper.
